releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Version 1.3.2

# Minor Bug Fix
- Fixed bug where the Taviliy workflow was not sending the data correctly to the Fabric Connector API.
- Fixed a bug where the Taviliy workflow was not sending the default post processing pattern with the list of patterns to the Fabric Connector API.
- Fixed a bug with sending data to fabric connector.

### Version: 1.3.0

# Features
- Added support for Fabric 2.0 (GO)
- Optimized updating pattern times

# Requirement
- 1.0.5 Fabric Connector must be installed
- Whisper be installed if you are using Audio File Detection on a Mac (using whisper instead of TS)
- Windows Audio File Detection will not work Fabric 2.0 since TS is not available yet.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixed bug where youtube link detection would not run if the Audio Files toggle was turned off.

# Features
- Added multiple pattern workflow
- Added default post processing pattern setting
- Added audio transcription with fabric's TS (currently using whisper instead of TS due to the lack of cli options for choosing an output folder)

# Requirement
- 1.0.4 Fabric Connector must be installed
- whisper be installed
- Windows has known bugs currently with /ts

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Features Added:

**Community Custom Patterns**: A repo that aims to collect users own custom fabric patterns from users that want to share and collaborate and get inspiration from others.

- Download patterns from the plugin (using the new repo as the source)
- Update patterns
- Uninstall patterns

[Communit Fabric Patterns](https://github.com/chasebank87/fabric-patterns)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Migrated away from direct fabric binary calls to the use of a fabric connector helper app and making direct calls to the API.

## Features:
  1. Fabric Connector API Integration
  2. Tavily Search as an input source
  3. Youtube Transcription
